---
title: "Recommended R Packages"
---

| Package | Use |
|---|---|
| `tidyverse` | Data wrangling and plotting |
| `dampack` | Cost-effectiveness analysis and PSA outputs |
| `heemod` | Markov models for health economic evaluation |
| `hesim` | Health economic simulation models |
| `BCEA` | Bayesian cost-effectiveness analysis |
| `flexsurv` | Parametric survival modeling |
